title: More Building Blocks
description: This mod currently adds more tuff, calcite, dripstone and basalt blocks! And even more coming in the future!
body:
# MORE BUILDING BLOCKS

### This mod aims to add 'missing' and whole new blocks!

For a full list of blocks, checkout [our wiki](https://github.com/ech0nyx/more-building-blocks-mod/wiki), or more specifically, [this page](https://github.com/ech0nyx/more-building-blocks-mod/wiki/Material-and-Block-Types)!
We try to keep all of our information updated, however some of it may still need to be corrected.

For a full crafting guide, check out our wiki's [crafting guide](https://github.com/ech0nyx/more-building-blocks-mod/wiki/Crafting-Guide).

**This mod is only available for Fabric. There are no plans for Forge and other mod loaders.**

**Feel free to include this mod in modpacks.**

![Requires Fabric API](https://images2.imgbox.com/8e/38/bfInI5qv_o.png)
